message:
✨ Fix tile tab highlight and content visibility for all tile counts (#147)

- Tab highlight in tile mode uses focusedTileId instead of only activeTabId
- Auto-sync activeTabId to first checked tile when entering tile mode
- Inactive single-mode tabs use visibility:hidden instead of display:none
  so xterm elements maintain full-viewport dimensions for size caching
- Add fallback size capture in useLayoutEffect for uncached terminals
- Add checkedTabs.length to useLayoutEffect deps for re-evaluation

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
